h3_population_dimension_debug.claim_boundary: debug-only estimate on fitted H3 population points. It cannot establish bulk by itself; population controls and receipt gates remain primary.

claim_boundary: support-visible cap-profile fit into H3 for record families or screen holonomy defects. A pass is a populated-chart diagnostic only; particle claims still require persistence, transport, fusion/scattering, and worldline controls.
